question: Which of the following statements best shows the link between education and long-term disaster mitigation ?

options.1: Education only helps in post-disaster relief operations
options.2: Technical education has no role in community safety
options.3: Awareness campaigns delay immediate relief measures
options.4: Educated communities are more likely to follow land-use rules and early warning instructions

question: During Cyclone Hudhud (2014), APSDMA's quick coordination between meteorological alerts and district administration helped minimize casualties. Which underlying principle of disaster governance does this reflect ?

options.1: Proactive risk governance integrating early warning with preparedness
options.2: Reactive management focused on post-disaster relief
options.4: Emergency planning limited to infrastructure rebuilding
